name: Suez Canal
description: Critical choke point connecting the Red Sea and Mediterranean.

name: Panama Canal
description: Key route for US Grain to Asia and LNG.

name: Strait of Hormuz
description: The world's most critical oil choke point.

name: Strait of Malacca
description: Main artery for energy flows to China and Japan.

name: Druzhba Pipeline
description: The 'Friendship' pipeline connecting Russia to Europe.

name: Eilat-Ashkelon Pipeline
description: Secretive Israeli pipeline linking Red Sea to Med. Used by Marc Rich and Glencore.

name: Baku-Tbilisi-Ceyhan (BTC)
description: Strategic route bypassing Russia for Caspian oil.

name: Trans-Siberian Railway
description: Artery for Russian Coal, Metals and Lumber to China.

description: US Grain from Midwest to PNW ports.

name: Carajas Railway
description: Iron Ore from Amazon to Ponta da Madeira.

name: Colonial Pipeline
description: US Gulf Coast refined products to East Coast.

name: Keystone Pipeline
description: Canadian heavy crude to US refineries.

name: Nord Stream
description: Russian gas under Baltic Sea to Germany.

name: Lobito Corridor
description: Copper/Cobalt from DRC/Zambia to Atlantic port of Lobito.
